name: Persist files
description: Persist specified files between devcontainer runs through a volume.

user.description: User to setup persisted directories for.

group.description: Group to setup persisted directories for.

paths.description: Comma-separated list of paths to persist. Use $USER to reference the configured user. If a path does not exist yet, a dangling symlink is created and the application creates the file or directory naturally on first use.
